title: Steamed French Clams with Creamy Minari Broth
description: A rich and flavorful seafood dish featuring the delicate taste of clams, minari, and a touch of creamy broth.

ingredients.name: Cream
ingredients.notes: Heavy cream or half and half

instructions: Rinse the clams under cold water and scrub them clean.
Melt the butter in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the garlic and sauté for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add the white wine and cook until reduced by half, about 2 minutes.
Add the minari and cook until wilted, about 3 minutes.
Add the clams, cover the saucepan, and cook until the clams open, about 5 minutes.
Stir in the cream and cook until heated through.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve the clams and broth in bowls and garnish with parsley.
